subTitle: If the Atlantis Bahamas isn't on your family's bucket list, it should be; family member ticks off their dream adventure that also gives back, proving this big resort has an even bigger heart.

subTitle: Tracking lions, spotted deer, owls and parrots in the desert of Gujurat; traditional dances.

subTitle: A tour of Kathmandu, Nepal, includes the World Heritage temple complexes; Mount Everest; Chitwan National Park is home to a myriad of wildlife.

subTitle: Fort St. George and the Fort Museum in Chennai, India; Sao Tome Basilica; colonial mansions of Pondicherry; ancient port city of Mahabalipuram features carved-stone architecture; Descent of Ganga.

subTitle: Lynton checks out an Aussie favourite in Bali; Scotty visits some of the smaller towns nestled among the Rocky Mountains; Lynton takes a look at the Great Wall of China; Carolyne continues her journey around London.

subTitle: Lynton visits Shanghai, one of China's most diverse cities; Scotty is in Canada and Carolyne continues her U.K. odyssey.

subTitle: Lynton is exploring the marvellous architecture and trendy eateries of Shanghai; Scotty wraps up his Canadian adventure; Lynton is in Uluwatu, enjoying a beautiful part of Indonesia; Carolyne visits the historical town of York.

subTitle: Natalie's change of heart may put an end to the dreams of communal living for the family; childhood sweethearts Joe and Maria seek a home for $240,000.

subTitle: Hastings couple Joe and Maria need to regroup; Americans Bonnie and Matt want a warm, dry home for their family and they've come up with a bold plan.

subTitle: Stockholm offers a winter break across 14 islands with medieval charm; Lisbon provides a sunny escape with cultural tours and surfing lessons.

subTitle: Rhys learns the tricks of the trade from a mascot from Japan, battles a roboticist, tries forest bathing and trains with a samurai master.

subTitle: Martin and Arthur are two of the world's best FPV drone pilots; now the duo team up with pro skier and Olympic medalist Kevin Rolland for a unique project mount a cinema camera on a racing drone and attempt to film some never-before-seen action.

subTitle: Cinematographer Guido Perrini has created many of the most revered ski and snowboard films; following him and multi-talented athlete Géraldine Fasnacht on a snowboarding and base jumping adventure in some of the most stunning peaks in the Swiss Alps.

subTitle: Bill explores the north and far south of Australia; in the north, the goal is to locate the biggest crocodiles and in the south, to watch the smallest penguins on earth parade by.

subTitle: The mighty polar bear gathers just before the Hudson Bay freezes over to make a dash to the open ocean and their favorite food-seals; Bill fulfills one of his childhood dreams, seeing the Great White Bear in the wild.

title: Travel Quest
subTitle: Bill first visits one of the greatest deserts in the world and finds out how the creatures and plants survive, and even thrive, in the harsh conditions; then he seeks, and hopefully finds, the mythical unicorn.

subTitle: Josh and Cody dive into the underworld; Josh explores the abandoned German mining industry and has an encounter with a police squad; in England, Cody explores an old Soviet submarine in the River Medway.

subTitle: Cody encounters wild animals and thrilling attractions in abandoned Six Flags New Orleans; Josh is in Cyprus where the U.N. peacekeeping force allows him to explore the abandoned Nicosia International Airport and the UN buffer zone.

subTitle: Bill travels through safari Africa to see various animals including elephants, crocodiles, miniature buffalos, antelope and wild lowland gorillas.

subTitle: Chris finds an Australian island with some unusual locals; he also finds out how fast he can go in futuristic Abu Dhabi; he tags along on an extreme four wheel drive day trip and finds out why the Color Run is taking over the world!

subTitle: Yann delves into N.J's skateboarding culture; he meets skateboarders who are into fashion horror comedy tattooing and rug-making; he also explores NJ Skate Shop and Freedom Skate Park, encountering Fred Gall and Brian Anderson.

subTitle: Marilia spreads love on her Treasure Island journey, capturing hidden gems from tranquil beaches to transformative sound healing; meets artists, experiences dolphin yoga; participates in a flamenco dance class, and shares a tea ceremony.

subTitle: After a surprise invite to visit the head of accessibility at Microsoft's headquarters in Seattle, James heads to Vancouver, known for its breathtaking natural beauty and self-proclaimed title of "most accessible city in the world."

subTitle: James sets out to discover what it's like to travel blind in the Big Apple, to see if someone like him can make it there.
